name: FileSystemAccess
description: File System Access API - user-activated file and directory pickers with live handle traversal and binary file reads.

transportOverrides.rationale: The directory async iterator is a live JavaScript iterator object whose identity and next-state must be retained through the existing browser iterator proxy transport.
entries() returns a live FileSystemDirectoryHandleAsyncIterator over name/handle tuples and must retain iterator and yielded handle identity.
keys() returns a live FileSystemDirectoryHandleAsyncIterator and must retain its asynchronous iteration state.
values() returns a live FileSystemDirectoryHandleAsyncIterator whose yielded FileSystemHandle values remain disposable proxies.
Symbol.asyncIterator returns the same live async iterator object and therefore preserves proxy identity rather than serializing iterator state.

reviewedExclusions.rationale: StartInDirectory is a FileSystemHandle-or-WellKnownDirectory union inside a JSON option dictionary; the current transport cannot preserve live handle identity in structural dictionary serialization.
StartInDirectory is a FileSystemHandle-or-WellKnownDirectory union inside a JSON option dictionary; the current transport cannot preserve live handle identity in structural dictionary serialization.

FileSystemWritableFileStream extends WritableStream and accepts the recursive FileSystemWriteChunkType union; no reviewed writable-stream transport exists, so the member is excluded rather than widened to object.
